target.title: Fix Kimi tool-call rewriting stop reason handling
target.body:
## Summary
- Rewrite Kimi tagged tool-call text blocks into structured tool calls for assistant messages.
- Preserve behavior for non-assistant messages by only rewriting `stopReason` when role is `assistant`.
- Add regression coverage for tool-call parsing and `stopReason` translation in `extensions/kimi-coding/stream.test.ts`.
- Added formatting cleanup in `stream.ts` around the `stopReason` rewrite block.

## Notes
- This change prevents assistant messages that include only Kimi tagged tool-call text from incorrectly returning `stopReason: "stop"` when tool calls are present.

## Real behavior proof
- Environment: OpenClaw repository checkout at `C:\Users\YNajj\Temp\openclaw-kimi`, branch `codex-kimi-stopreason-fix-20260520115500` in fork `NeroNarada/openclaw`.
- Command run from real setup:
```bash
$include='["kimi-coding/stream.test.ts"]'
Set-Content -Path C:\Users\YNajj\Temp\openclaw-kimi\tmp-openclaw-include.json -Value $include -NoNewline
$env:OPENCLAW_VITEST_INCLUDE_FILE='C:\Users\YNajj\Temp\openclaw-kimi\tmp-openclaw-include.json'
pnpm --dir C:\Users\YNajj\Temp\openclaw-kimi exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-providers.config.ts
```
- Captured live terminal output from the run:
```text
 RUN  v4.1.6 C:/Users/YNajj/Temp/openclaw-kimi

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  17 passed (17)
   Start at  12:00:43
   Duration  645ms (transform 304ms, setup 208ms, import 256ms, tests 51ms, environment 0ms)
```
- Assertion scope: includes the new assistant/user role guard and regression for Kimi tool-call rewrite in `extensions/kimi-coding/stream.test.ts`.

## Merge checklist
- [x] Targeted extension test run passes in a real OpenClaw checkout for `extensions/kimi-coding/stream.test.ts`.
- [x] Assistant-role-only `stopReason: "stop"` rewrite is covered by tests and code guard.
- [ ] Final PR review confirms expected `stopReason` behavior for non-assistant messages.
- [ ] After-green checks, safe to merge (change is limited to `extensions/kimi-coding/stream.ts` and focused regression file).
target.author: neronarada
